data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Conditional webhooks (only if condition met)', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions conditional webhooks, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation of this feature, such as specific API responses or logs showing the conditions under which webhooks are triggered. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of conditional webhooks being implemented or triggered based on specific conditions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for conditional webhook implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that webhooks are triggered only when specified conditions are met.
